steps.title: Use the fabric detail
steps.content: The student's goal is to describe how fabric is used in Assertion of Will. The relevant note says the figures' clothing is made of fabric pieces stitched to the painting's canvas.

steps.title: Choose the direct description
steps.content: B and D give exhibition context without describing fabric, and C mentions clothed figures without explaining how fabric is incorporated. The best choice states that the clothing is made of fabric pieces stitched to the canvas. The answer is A.
